notes: The pin is the commit SHA (pinned_sha), never the tag: tags are mutable, SHAs are the pin.
STALE-GITHUB-MIRROR DISCREPANCY (surfaced during the Rung-1 build, 2026-07-12): the
plan (WyredPlan3dRung1.md) assumed github.com/KiCad/* are current GitLab mirrors and
forked them to owebeeone/klibs-*. In fact the github.com/KiCad/{kicad-symbols,
kicad-footprints,kicad-packages3D} mirrors are FROZEN at KiCad 5.1.7 (the project moved
to GitLab ~2020). The 10.0.x train lives ONLY on gitlab.com/kicad/libraries/*. So the
owebeeone/klibs-* forks (recorded per-library as fork_url) cannot serve 10.0.x objects
until they are re-synced from GitLab. materialize.py therefore fetches from `upstream`
(GitLab canonical). fetch_order lists the URLs materialize tries, in order.
TWIN DISCREPANCY: packages3D 10.0.4 ships 7241 .step files and ZERO .wrl files (the .wrl
twins are generated at packaging time, not stored in git). The materializer fetches the
.step twin for every referenced model and confesses that the .wrl twin is absent-upstream;
it is not a fetch failure. kicad-cli --subst-models does NOT resolve a .wrl board ref from
a .step-only tree (the .wrl file must physically exist), so .wrl refs stay unresolved by
kicad-cli against a git-materialized view -- this is expected and confessed, not fixed.
SYMBOLS-LAYOUT DISCREPANCY: at 10.0.x kicad-symbols uses the split *.kicad_symdir/ layout
(per-symbol files, e.g. Device.kicad_symdir/R.kicad_sym), not monolithic Device.kicad_sym.
license_summary: CC-BY-SA-4.0 with the KiCad libraries exception. Unmodified upstream trees; each materialized view root carries the upstream LICENSE.md.

symbols.fork_status: STALE: forked from github.com/KiCad/kicad-symbols which is frozen at 5.1.7; re-sync from upstream (GitLab) to make it a real 10.0.x availability pin.
